title: The Railroad Man
writer: Alfredo Giannetti, Pietro Germi, Luciano Vincenzoni
actors: Pietro Germi, Luisa Della Noce, Sylva Koscina
plot: The railroad engineer Andrea Marcocci has been working with his partner and friend Gigi Liverani for thirty years and feels happy and proud of his work, drinking wine after hours with his friends in a bar owned by the former railr...
